## Source: ghsa-malware (6ba5364d9aa9e6a625e836c497db4b622e95e7765a56c7d6fa8d30630a9e0a74)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (2781d258b292d5959839a52e0e940040defaae1ecbb1293c0d149dc5f6faf110)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'message_gateway' @ 0.0.1 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.

---

Credit: [OpenSSF](https://github.com/ossf/malicious-packages) ([source](https://github.com/ossf/malicious-packages/blob/9fbb5fba02ba2f02395d3d2d43c31b2c482b7a9d/osv/malicious/rubygems/message_gateway/MAL-2025-6265.json))

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
